projectDescription: A collection of agent skills that teach AI coding assistants (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode) to create and edit Obsidian vault files including Obsidian Flavored Markdown, Bases, JSON Canvas, and CLI interactions.
keyFeatures: Obsidian Flavored Markdown authoring with wikilinks, callouts, embeds, and properties
Obsidian Bases (.base) creation with table/cards/list/map views, filters, and formulas
JSON Canvas (.canvas) authoring with nodes, edges, groups, and connections
Obsidian CLI integration for vault read/write, task management, and plugin development
Defuddle web content extraction for clean markdown from any URL
Compatible with Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode via the Agent Skills specification
Installation via marketplace, npx skills, or manual setup
publicApiSurface: skills/obsidian-cli — SKILL.md for CLI vault interactions
skills/defuddle — SKILL.md for web content extraction
obsidian CLI commands: read, create, append, search, daily:*, property:set, tasks, tags, backlinks, plugin:reload, dev:errors, dev:screenshot, dev:dom, eval
Bases filter syntax: and/or/not operators, file.hasTag(), file.inFolder(), file.hasLink()
Bases formula functions: date(), now(), today(), if(), duration(), file(), link(), min(), max()
JSON Canvas node types: text, file, link, group
JSON Canvas edge attributes: fromNode, toNode, fromSide, toSide, fromEnd, toEnd, label, color
